userStories.title: Fix 11 orphaned breadcrumb edges
userStories.description: Update broken file references in @crumb edge declarations. Specific fixes: publish/route.ts edges to derived-asset.repo.ts and distribution-account.repo.ts (not asset.repo.ts/account.repo.ts), jobs/route.ts edge to distribution-job.repo.ts (not job.repo.ts), process/route.ts edge to decomposition.service.ts (not content-decompose.ts), queue/page.tsx remove edges to nonexistent /api/queue and /api/queue/slots, theme-toggle.tsx remove edge to nonexistent domain/theme.ts, supabase/client.ts fix directory edge to specific file, frameworks.ts fix speculative edge, segments/route.ts fix self-referential path, interfaces/decomposition.service.ts fix circular edge. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: Zero orphaned edges pointing to nonexistent files
All edge targets verified to exist on disk
grep confirms no references to asset.repo.ts or job.repo.ts or content-decompose.ts

userStories.title: Remove 3 duplicate breadcrumb blocks
userStories.description: Remove the duplicated @crumb blocks from: apps/studio/src/app/logbook/demo/page.tsx, apps/studio/src/app/assembly/demo/page.tsx, apps/studio/src/app/archive/page.tsx. Each has the crumb block copy-pasted twice. Remove the second copy, keep the first. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: Each file has exactly one @crumb block
grep -c @crumb returns 1 for each file
No duplicate metadata lines in any file

userStories.title: Fix 3 semantic edge errors in Studio
userStories.description: Fix incorrect edge relationship types: CaptureButton.tsx edge to MasterTimecode.tsx should be RELATES not CALLS (sibling components), ConsoleLayout.tsx edge to YouTubePlayer.tsx should be RELATES not SERVES (slot prop pattern), MasterTimecode.tsx edge to WaveformTimeline.tsx should be removed entirely (no actual relationship). acceptanceCriteria: CaptureButton edge uses RELATES not CALLS
ConsoleLayout edge uses RELATES not SERVES
MasterTimecode has no edge to WaveformTimeline

userStories.title: Standardize breadcrumb format to line-comment style
userStories.description: Convert JSDoc-style @crumb blocks (/** @crumb with id: on next line, uses AREA: field) found in domain/, services/, lib/ files to line-comment style (// @crumb id-here on first line, [AREA] | tags on second line) to match the majority pattern used in infrastructure/, API routes, UI files. Preserve all content, just reformat. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: Zero files use JSDoc block style for crumbs
All crumbs start with // @crumb kebab-id
All area codes use [AREA] | tag format

userStories.title: Fix 4 area code mismatches on service interfaces
userStories.description: Change area codes on 4 service interface files from DAT to DOM to match their concrete service implementations: interfaces/asset-generator.service.ts, interfaces/decomposition.service.ts, interfaces/distribution.service.ts, interfaces/media.service.ts. Keep transcript.service.ts as-is (defines result data shapes). If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>

transcript interface remains DAT

userStories.title: Add cross-app edges between Studio and Content OS
userStories.description: Add edge declarations linking Studio to Content OS where integration points exist: Studio supabase/client.ts edge to infra/supabase/docker-compose.yml (READS), Content OS transcript.service.ts edge to infra/freeflow/docker-compose.yml (READS), Studio video upload edge to Content OS media.service.ts (RELATES). userStories.title: Create auth middleware for Content OS and Studio
userStories.description: Create Next.js middleware.ts for both apps/content-os/ and apps/studio/ that validates Supabase JWT on all /api/* routes. Middleware should: extract Bearer token from Authorization header, verify JWT using Supabase auth.getUser(), inject userId into request headers (x-user-id), return 401 for missing/invalid tokens, allow /api/health without auth. Use @supabase/ssr for cookie-based auth. Create the middleware.ts files and a shared auth utility. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: middleware.ts exists in both app roots
Unauthenticated /api/* requests return 401 JSON
Valid JWT requests pass with x-user-id header set
/api/health accessible without auth

userStories.title: Create API route wrapper with error sanitization
userStories.description: Create withApiHandler() wrapper function for both apps at src/lib/api-handler.ts. The wrapper should: catch all errors and return sanitized JSON (no internal details), validate request body with optional Zod schema, add request correlation ID (x-request-id), log requests with structured format, extract userId from x-user-id header (set by middleware). Export typed helper. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: api-handler.ts exists in both apps
Error responses contain only message and status code
No stack traces or internal class names in error responses
Request correlation ID present in all responses

userStories.title: Add rate limiting middleware
userStories.description: Create rate limiting for both apps. Use a simple in-memory token bucket (no Redis dependency for now). Configure per-route limits: default 100 req/min, AI processing routes (process, assets) 10 req/min, media upload 20 req/min. Return 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded. Config via env vars RATE_LIMIT_DEFAULT, RATE_LIMIT_AI, RATE_LIMIT_UPLOAD. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: Rate limit helper exists in both apps
Exceeding limit returns 429 with Retry-After
AI routes have stricter limits than default
Limits configurable via environment variables

userStories.title: SSRF prevention and secure file paths
userStories.description: Fix media clip route: validate source_url against allowlist, reject private IP ranges (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x, 169.254.x, localhost, 127.x), enforce HTTPS scheme. Fix media upload route: replace Math.random() with crypto.randomUUID() for upload path generation. Add URL validation utility at src/lib/url-validation.ts. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: URL validation utility rejects private IPs
Clip route rejects non-HTTPS URLs
Upload route uses crypto.randomUUID not Math.random
No SSRF possible via media endpoints

userStories.title: Encrypt OAuth tokens and secure service key
userStories.description: Encrypt OAuth access/refresh tokens before storing in distribution_accounts table. Use AES-256-GCM matching the pattern in packages/ai-core/src/keys.ts. Add server-only enforcement on createServiceClient() using next server-only package. Fix Kong hide_credentials to true in kong.yml. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth tokens encrypted before database write
Decryption works on read from database
createServiceClient imports server-only package
Kong hide_credentials set to true

userStories.title: Migrate all 24 API routes to use middleware and wrapper
userStories.description: Apply withApiHandler() to all 13 Content OS API routes and all 11 Studio API routes. Remove hardcoded userId (use ctx.userId from wrapper). Remove inline try/catch (wrapper handles errors). Ensure all routes use the Zod validation parameter where schemas exist. This is a bulk migration — work through routes methodically. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: All 24 routes wrapped with withApiHandler
Zero hardcoded userId strings in any route
All routes return sanitized error responses
TypeScript compiles with no errors

userStories.title: Create Supabase transaction helper

Use supabase.rpc() with a custom Postgres function, or use the Supabase JS client's ability to chain operations. Apply to: workers.ts (delete segments + create new), content-segment.repo.ts (bulk insert), distribution publish (multi-account). workers.ts uses transaction for delete+create
Partial failure rolls back all changes

userStories.title: Configure bounded retry with dead letter queue
userStories.description: Configure pg-boss with: maxRetries 5, exponential backoff (retryDelay with backoff factor), dead letter queue table for permanently failed jobs. Update pg-boss.ts singleton configuration. Add monitoring query for dead letter items. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: pg-boss configured with max 5 retries
Failed jobs move to dead letter after max retries
Backoff increases between retries
Dead letter queue queryable

userStories.title: Add pagination to all list endpoints

userStories.title: DST-safe scheduling for publishing queues
userStories.description: Replace raw timeOfDay string handling with proper timezone-aware scheduling. Validate timezone field against IANA timezone database. Handle DST transitions by computing next occurrence in the target timezone, not UTC offset. Use Temporal API or date-fns-tz. If blocked for 2+ iterations, document blockers in progress.txt and output <promise>BLOCKED</promise>
acceptanceCriteria: Timezone field validated against IANA database
Queue slots compute correctly across DST boundaries
Invalid timezone rejected with clear error
TypeScript compiles with no errors
